If you find this, you deserve to be part of $GOTCHI
This is a fun experiment to onboard people that are not part of Sleepagotchi. It fatures a 3333 supply (Half of the initial supply)
Have fun while at it!
Don't bot it, or you might just make it less fun.

minting_now.name: Harmonic Bauhaus
minting_now.description: Harmonic Bauhaus is a 777-piece animated generative collection of living digital posters seeded geometry, rhythmic motion, and Bauhaus color systems composed into collectible artworks inspired by the Art Blocks era of generative art.

Each piece showcases a unique blend of colors, textures, and geometric compositions, creating a futuristic yet meditative feel

minting_now.name: Nullforms
minting_now.description:
Null Forms is a generative study of unstable identity,

minting_now.name: Ndebele Women
minting_now.description:
About Ndebele woman
Ndebele women are people in South Africa, known for their rich artistic traditions, particularly vibrant mural paintings and intricate beadwork.
Idzila refers to the brass or copper rings worn by married Ndebele women around their neck, arms, and legs
They are artists that I want

upcoming.name: world's most famous artworks painted edition
upcoming.description:
the entire history of art compressed into 500 chaotic jpegs.

different centuries, different artists, different techniques, same essence.

1/1 world's most famous artworks of all time meticulously re-created with one hand and a mouse in paint.

Some look smug, some look dazed,
